name: Pineapple-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 can Dole Crushed Pineapple (in syrup, use pineapple packed in juice if desired)
1 cup Dole Natural Almonds (toasted and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple well and reserve 1/2 cup of syrup.
2. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar and margarine until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg and drained pineapple with the reserved syrup.
4. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, raisins, and chopped almonds.
5. Blend the dry ingredients into the pineapple mixture.
6. Drop by 2 heaping tablespoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Flatten the tops of the cookies with the back of a spoon.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20-25 minutes until golden brown.
9. Cool on wire racks.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
